name: Round Steak with Rich Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10.5 oz) condensed cream of Mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 5 or more serving pieces.
2. Place the pieces in a slow-cooking pot.
3. Add the dry onion soup mix, water, and condensed mushroom soup to the pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
5. Serve with mashed potatoes.
Source: Crockery Cookery by Mable Hoffman
: page 102
NOTE: I used blade steak instead of round steak, works just as well!
